blocks.text: This slice moves the provider-neutral C4 bridge entrypoint and detect helpers.

items: Public CI for bridge run, detect, session handoff, and fail-closed probe gates

blocks.text: The bridge wires adapter `BuildStart` into the public `internal/process` port and session actor. Detectutil owns env override pinning, PATH fallback, version probes, and strict exit-code probe helpers.
This slice does not move runtimeactor, supervisor, controlplane, concrete adapters, native approval policy, task DB/project/local API packages, packaging, infra, secrets, or local machine state.
